Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:吉岡町の建築物]] to [[Category:Architecture of Yoshioka Town]]: Merge [[Category:吉岡町の建築物]] into [[Category:Architecture of Yoshioka Town]] via bot

Merge [[Category:群馬県の建築物 ( by Municipality)]] into [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Gunma Prefecture]] via bot

Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Copying from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] to [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[群馬県]][[北群馬郡]][[吉岡町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{citation needed|よしおかまち}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|よしおかまち}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:吉岡町の建築物|version=99407942}} {{translated page|ja|吉岡町の建築物|2=Category:吉岡町の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
[[ja:Category:吉岡町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Sannomiya Shrine (Yoshioka Town)]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Yoshioka, Gunma]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[群馬県]][[北群馬郡]][[吉岡町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{citation needed|よしおかまち}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|よしおかまち}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:吉岡町の建築物|version=99407942}} {{translated page|ja|吉岡町の建築物|2=Category:吉岡町の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
[[ja:Category:吉岡町の建築物]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Sannomiya Shrine (Yoshioka Town)]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Yoshioka, Gunma]] [[Category:Categories]] [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
